hubspot.note: Tagged as a strategic target account — largest deal in this quarter's pipeline, high-visibility loss internally.

meddpiccNotes.metrics: VP Security projected $400k/year in avoided audit remediation costs.
meddpiccNotes.economicBuyer: VP Security & Compliance confirmed as budget owner; attended exec review personally.
meddpiccNotes.decisionCriteria: SOC2 Type II, FedRAMP roadmap, dedicated CSM.
meddpiccNotes.decisionProcess: VP Security approves with CFO sign-off required above $100k — noted explicitly in 2026-03-10 exec review.
meddpiccNotes.paperProcess: Legal review started 2026-05-01, redlines exchanged twice, nearly finalized by June.
meddpiccNotes.identifyPain: Upcoming SOC2 Type II audit with known compliance gaps flagged by external auditor.
meddpiccNotes.champion: Compliance Manager ran weekly working sessions with our team through May, consistently positive.
meddpiccNotes.competition: Vanta named early as an alternative but ruled out for lacking a dedicated CSM model.

activityTimeline.summary: Executive review; VP Security confirms budget authority and CFO sign-off requirement above $100k.
Legal review kicked off; redlines exchanged.
Final negotiation call. VP Security says a company-wide spending freeze was just announced and all new contracts above $100k are paused indefinitely.

emails.subject: Re: Final terms — Security & Compliance Suite
emails.snippet: Genuinely disappointing timing — a company-wide spending freeze on new contracts over $100k was just announced this week. This is on hold indefinitely, not a no.

proposal.summary: Proposal accepted in principle; only blocker at close was the company-wide budget freeze, unrelated to product fit or pricing objections.
proposal.scopeSummary: Full security & compliance suite, dedicated CSM, multi-year term option.
